title: Eye-eye snake
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Eye-eye snakes''' were wild [[Species/Legends|creatures]] that lived on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]. They were snakes that had eyes on both ends, the forward one used for looking where it was going, the rear one used for watching for predators. Although they hissed at people who were near them, they were harmless.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' {{1st}}
